name: moxn-session-capture
description: Moxn for your coding agent: capture sessions into Moxn (lifecycle hooks) AND read/search your Moxn knowledge base + past sessions via MCP — scoped to one workspace.

capture_enabled.title: Enable session capture
capture_enabled.description: Master switch for the background capture hooks. When off, NOTHING is captured — no local spooling and no network sync (independent of any API key). Leave on to capture; pair with an API key to sync. Reads/search via the MCP are unaffected.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Your Moxn workspace subdomain — the part before .moxn.dev (e.g. 'acme' for acme.moxn.dev). This connection is hard-scoped to this one workspace.

api_key.title: API key (session capture)
api_key.description: A Moxn API key for this workspace (moxn.dev/settings/api-keys). Used by the background capture hooks to sync your sessions. Optional — without it the hooks spool locally and skip syncing. The MCP reads/search use OAuth, not this key.
